text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sigh... They really take it out of you...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I've only been wearing them for a bit, but my legs
are all wobbly! Heels are the worst...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Maybe I should take a quick grown-up
break before I head to the next shop.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That sundae looks so good! ☆ And the toppings
are really cute! Guess I'll take my break here.

text_block_list.name: Cafe Staff
text_block_list.text:
Welcome! Oh, that sundae is very popular with
our younger customers.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Uh... Never mind! It looks really good, but I'm a
grown-up!
